auth.parentAccountHint: Your child will have their own kid-safe profile
auth.resetHint: Enter the email you used to sign up and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetSentHint: Check your inbox and click the link in the email
auth.coppaConsent: I am the parent or legal guardian and I agree to
auth.errorPasswordWeak: Password must contain letters and numbers
auth.errorUserExists: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.
auth.errorSignupDisabled: Sign-up is temporarily unavailable. Please try later.
auth.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.errorNetwork: No internet connection. Check your connection.
auth.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try later.
auth.deleteConfirm1Message: All data will be permanently removed. Cannot be undone.

onboarding.tutorialStart: Let me show you how to play

game.otherGameA11yHint: Returns to the island game list

tapTheDot.name: Tap the dot
tapTheDot.rules:
A pink dot 🎯 will appear on the screen.

Your task — quickly tap right on it!

If you hit — great! If you miss — you'll see a thinking face and try again.

There are 5 dots per level. Fewer misses = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

countObjects.name: Count the apples
countObjects.question: How many apples?
countObjects.rules:
Apples 🍎 will appear on the screen.

Count them and enter the number using the keypad.

Tap ⌫ to erase, OK to answer.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

recognizeDigit.name: Recognize the digit
recognizeDigit.rules:
A large digit or a group of apples 🍎 appears on the screen.

Pick the correct option from three choices.

🔢 Digit → quantity: we show a digit, find that many apples.
🍎 Quantity → digit: we show apples, pick the correct digit.
🔀 Mixed: both modes interleaved.

Numbers 1-10. Five tasks per level.

mathExpressions.name: Math Problems
mathExpressions.rules:
An ➕ addition or ➖ subtraction problem will appear.

Tap the correct answer from four options.

🟢 Easy: addition only
🟡 Medium: addition and subtraction
🔴 Hard: addition and subtraction with a timer

Numeric range depends on your class (10 / 20 / 100 / 1000).

Five problems per level.

mathCompare.name: Compare
mathCompare.rules:
An empty box ⬚ appears between two expressions.

Compare and pick: > (greater), < (less) or = (equal).

🟢 Easy: number vs number (only > or <)
🟡 Medium: expression vs number
🔴 Hard: expression vs expression + timer

Operations and range depend on your class:
• Grade 1 — only +, up to 10
• Grade 2 — +, −, ×, ÷, up to 10
• Grade 3 — all signs, tens
• Grade 4 — all signs, hundreds, operator precedence

Five tasks per level.

shapes.name: Shapes
shapes.rules:
A shape name will appear with a few options.

Tap the shape whose name is shown at the top.

🟢 Easy: basic shapes
🟡 Medium: more shapes
🔴 Hard: all shapes + timer

Grade 1 also learns: oval, rhombus, pentagon, hexagon, cube, cone, cylinder.

Five tasks per level.

letters.name: Find the letter
letters.rules:
A letter will appear with 4 options.

Tap the same letter shown at the top.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

syllableBuild.name: Build a syllable
syllableBuild.rules:
A consonant is shown with an empty slot.

Pick the right vowel to build the syllable.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

numberPatterns.name: Continue the sequence
numberPatterns.rules:
A number sequence with a step is shown. E.g. 2, 4, 6, 8, ?

Spot the pattern and pick the correct next number from four options.

🟢 Easy: constant step, ascending
🟡 Medium: bigger step or descending
🔴 Hard: mixed step or non-linear patterns + timer

Five tasks per level.

lettersEn.name: Find the letter (EN)
lettersEn.rules:
A Latin letter will appear with 4 options.

Tap the same letter shown at the top.

ABC practice — letters A to T.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

englishWord.name: Words + pictures
englishWord.rules:
A picture and 3 English words will appear.

Tap the correct word for the picture.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

emotions.name: Emotions
emotions.rules:
A face with an emotion will appear on screen.

Pick the correct emotion name from three options.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

memoryMatch.name: Find the pair
memoryMatch.rules:
The board has cards face down.

Tap two cards. If the images match, the pair stays open.

If not, the cards flip back.

Find all pairs to win!

Pair count grows with level and class (4-12 pairs).

memoryAssociations.name: What goes with what?
memoryAssociations.rules:
The board has cards face down.

Tap two cards. If they are **associated** (cow → milk, bee → honey) the pair stays open.

If not, they flip back.

Trains memory and logical connections.

animals.name: Where do they live?
animals.rules:
An animal will appear on screen 🐾.

Pick where it lives: 🌳 forest, 🏠 home, or 🌊 sea.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

whatsChanged.name: What's changed?
whatsChanged.rules:
Watch carefully — items will appear. Remember them.

Then one item will change. Find and tap the one that became different!

Item count and memorize time depend on your class.

Hard level uses same-category replacement (🍎 → 🍐) + a timer.

digitSpan.name: Memorize the digits
digitSpan.rules:
Digits will appear on screen one by one.

Memorize them in the correct order!

When the screen clears, enter the digits on the keypad in the same order and tap OK.

Sequence length grows with level and class (2-7 digits).

Hard level includes an input timer.

reverseSequence.name: Repeat backwards
reverseSequence.rules:
Colored buttons light up one by one.

Remember the sequence and repeat it in **reverse** order — last → first.

Length grows with level and class (2-6 colors).

Hard level includes an input timer.

sortingGame.name: Sort in order
sortingGame.rules:
Objects appear on screen in random order.

Tap them in the correct sequence — first → last.

For example: 🌱 → 🌿 → 🌸 → 🍎 (plant growth stages).

Item count grows with level.
Hard level adds a timer.

attr.day: Day cycle: morning → day → evening → night

colors.name: Find the color
colors.rules:
A color name appears on top with circles of different colors below.

Tap the correct color.

🟢 Easy: 6 basic colors
🟡 Medium: 10 colors (+pink, brown, black, white)
🔴 Hard: + timer

Grade 1 also learns gray, cyan, lime, navy (14 total).

Five tasks per level.

waterStates.name: Water
waterStates.rules:
An item related to water will appear.

Choose its state: 🧊 solid, 💧 liquid, or 💨 gas.

🟢 Easy: basic items (ice, snow, water, sea, cloud, steam)
🟡 Medium: full pool + less obvious ones (iceberg, rain, fog)
🔴 Hard: full pool + timer (faster for older grades)

uaSymbols.name: Symbols of Ukraine
uaSymbols.rules:
Recognize state and cultural symbols of Ukraine.

Sometimes you see the symbol — pick the name.
Sometimes you see a name — pick the matching image.

Symbols: flag, trident, sunflower, viburnum, stork, vyshyvanka, pysanka, Kyiv Golden Gate, map.

worldFlags.name: Flags and continents
worldFlags.rules:
A country's flag appears with its name.

Pick which continent it belongs to.

Continents: Europe, Asia, Africa, North & South America, Australia/Oceania.

🟢 Easy: most famous countries
🟡 Medium: broader pool
🔴 Hard: all countries + timer (grades 3-4)

continentsOceans.name: Continents and oceans
continentsOceans.rules:
Answer questions about continents and oceans.

For example: «Which continent do pandas live on?» → Asia.

🟢 Easy: basic continent facts
🟡 Medium: + oceans
🔴 Hard: deeper facts + timer

Builds geographic knowledge for grades 3-4.

plantGrow.name: Plant growth
plantGrow.rules:
A plant at a certain growth stage will appear on screen.

Identify the stage: 🌰 seed, 🌱 sprout, 🌿 plant, 🌸 flower, or 🍎 fruit.

🟢 Easy: 3 stages (seed, sprout, fruit)
🟡 Medium: all 5 stages, 4 answer choices
🔴 Hard: all 5 stages + timer

timesFlashcards.name: Times flashcards
timesFlashcards.rules:
Flashcard training for multiplication tables.

Card shows a problem: 7 × 8 = ?
Think it through, tap **Show answer**.
Then honestly rate yourself: ✓ knew it or ✗ didn't.

🟢 Easy: 5 cards, multiplication only
🟡 Medium: 10 cards, + division
🔴 Hard: 15 cards, + division

Flashcards are a memory trainer. No wrong answers here — just honest "knew it" vs "need more practice".

magicSquare.name: Magic square
magicSquare.rules:
3×3 grid with digits 1-9.

Each digit appears exactly ONCE.
Row/column/diagonal sums = 15.

Fill the empty cells.

🟢 Easy: 2-4 empty
🟡 Medium: 4-6 empty
🔴 Hard: 6-8 empty

3 puzzles per level.

measures.name: Measures
measures.rules:
Three modes for learning units:

🏷 Which unit — pick the right unit for the object (cm/m/kg/l...)
🔁 Convert — convert value between units (1 m = 100 cm)
⚖ Compare — which is bigger: 3 m or 250 cm?

Units available by grade:
• Grade 1 — cm, m, kg
• Grade 2 — + dm, g, l
• Grade 3 — + mm, km, ml
• Grade 4 — + t, all units

sudoku.name: Sudoku
sudoku.rules:
Classic 9×9 sudoku.

Every row, column, and 3×3 box must contain digits 1-9 without repeats.

Tap an empty cell, then tap a digit below.

🟢 Easy — many clues, comfortable for grades 1-2
🟡 Medium — fewer clues
🔴 Hard — few clues, challenge for grades 3-4

Tap «Check» to highlight errors in red. «Give up» ends early.

moneyBasics.name: Money
moneyBasics.rules:
Three modes: count, pay exact, give change.

🪙 Count — how much money is on the table
💳 Pay exact — pick coins to make the required sum
💵 Change — how much change you get back

Range by grade:
• Grade 1 — up to 50 UAH
• Grade 2 — up to 100 UAH
• Grade 3 — up to 1000 UAH (with kopecks)
• Grade 4 — up to 10000 UAH (with kopecks)

clockTime.name: What time is it?
clockTime.rules:
A clock with hands or a digital time appears.

If an analog clock is shown — pick the matching digital time from 4 options.
If a digital time is shown — find the matching clock face among 4 options.

Both directions are mixed randomly.

By grade:
• Preschool — hours only (7:00) and half (7:30)
• Grade 1 — + quarters (7:15, 7:45)
• Grade 2 — 5-minute steps
• Grade 3 — any minute + 24-hour format
• Grade 4 — full range + timer

fractionsCompare.name: Fractions: which is bigger?
fractionsCompare.rules:
Two fractions on screen as colored pie charts and numbers.

Pick the sign between them: > (greater), < (less) or = (equal).

🟢 Easy: unit fractions (1/2, 1/3, 1/4) with visuals
🟡 Medium: proper fractions m/n with visuals
🔴 Hard: without visuals + timer (grade 4 includes improper fractions like 5/3)

Available from grade 2.

columnArithmetic.name: Column arithmetic
columnArithmetic.rules:
Column addition and subtraction.

Numbers are stacked vertically. Tap the answer digits **right to left** — ones first, then tens, then hundreds.

For addition, a small «1» appears above the next column — that's the carry.

Tap OK when all digits are entered.

Range by grade:
• Grade 1 — up to 50
• Grade 2 — up to 100
• Grade 3 — up to 1000 (3 digits)
• Grade 4 — up to 10000 (4 digits)

timesTables.name: Times tables
timesTables.rules:
A **×** or **÷** problem will appear.

Pick the correct answer from four options.

Stuck? Tap 💡 for the multiplication row of the relevant number.

🟢 Easy: multiplication only
🟡 Medium: multiplication and division
🔴 Hard: + timer (grades 3-4)

Table range depends on grade:
• Grade 2 — full table 0-10
• Grade 3 — full table 2-9
• Grade 4 — extended up to ×12

lifeScenarios.name: What would you do?
lifeScenarios.feelHint: Pick more than one if you like
lifeScenarios.rules:
We'll show you a situation.

🎭 First — how do you feel? (medium/hard levels)
🙋 Then — what will you do? Pick an option.
💭 See what happens next.

One action is the kindest. Others are possible but less good.

There's no right or wrong about feelings — all yours matter.

breathing.name: Breathing
breathing.rules:
Watch the balloon 🎈.

When it grows — breathe in. When it shrinks — breathe out.

Repeat 5 times to calm down.

This is a relaxation exercise — no mistakes here!

safetyBasic.name: Safety
safetyBasic.rules:
A situation will appear on screen.

🛡️ Pick the safest option.
💡 See what happens after your choice.

🟢 Easy and medium: no timer
🔴 Hard: 25-second timer (grades 2-4)

These skills can help you in real life!

taglines.emotions: Name the emotion on the face
taglines.sinkFloat: Does it sink or float in water?
taglines.lifeScenarios: How would you act in different situations

parent.timeHint: Coming soon: daily time limit & schedule.
parent.scheduleHint: Coming soon: allowed hours for playing.
parent.activityEmpty: Stats will appear after the first game.
parent.pinSetupHint: PIN protects the parent panel from the child.
parent.pinHint: PIN is required to access the parent panel.
parent.pinForgotHint: Confirm the password for {{email}} to set a new PIN. Or send a password reset email.

learn.doneHint: You're ready — reinforce it in the game

profiles.deleteConfirmMsg: This child's progress will be lost.
